title: Codex Round Completed Event
description: Emitted by the authoring agent after each Codex adversarial-review round resolves (per CLAUDE.md per-PR adversarial-review cadence). Records the round verdict + findings-by-severity so the cockpit can render the round-by-round convergence trajectory and the severity-weighted defect metric (design v0.2 §7.2). A round whose verdict is needs-attention with an architectural_judgment_finding triggers the hard-floor item 6 STOP-and-escalate path — it MUST NOT be closed inline.

verdict.description: recommend-pass-1 / recommend-pass-2 are the dual-recommendation two-pass consult verdicts (CLAUDE.md 2026-05-20); approve/needs-attention are standard adversarial-review verdicts

architectural_judgment_findings.description: Count of hard-floor item 6 findings (net-new schema/invariant/platform-floor beyond ratified scope). > 0 means this round triggered STOP-and-escalate, not inline closure.

findings_closed_inline.description: Findings closed inline this round (within-scope corrections)

escalation_artifact.description: Path to the Engineering Review Request / Decision Memo authored if architectural_judgment_findings > 0
